speaker: Argo
text: Should I invite Professor Celio...? *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: You sure do like your tea, don’t you? *sigh*

speaker: Celio
text: Yes, I prefer it over coffee.

speaker: Argo
text: Professor Derich is the coffee drinker.

speaker: Celio
text: Correct. Do you find that strange?

speaker: Argo
text: No, I was just wondering if you two ever have tea together. *sigh*

speaker: Celio
text: Ah... I see... Well, I tend to drink by myself.

speaker: Celio
text: Is something the matter? I was not expecting that kind of question. *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: Professor Derich said he still doesn’t know that much about you. *sigh*

speaker: Celio
text: I don’t think that’s true…

speaker: Argo
text: But he seemed kind of lonely, you know.

speaker: Celio
text: "I can't believe it..." *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: And he’s not the only one, I’d like to get to know you better too. *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: If I start drinking tea, can I have tea with you more often? *sigh*

speaker: Celio
text: You don’t need to force yourself to like the same things just to have a drink together.

speaker: Celio
text: I will have tea and you have coffee. There is nothing wrong with that. *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: That’s true.

speaker: Celio
text: Besides, we’re talking a bath together now, right? *sigh*

speaker: Celio
text: The fact that we are comfortable being naked around each other is proof enough of just how well we get along. *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: ... You’re right.

speaker: Argo
text: All right then! Tell me what kind of people you’re attracted to! *paw prints*

speaker: Celio
text: Th-That came out of nowhere.

speaker: Argo
text: I was just thinking I'd ask you something different now that we’re finally in here together…

speaker: Celio
text: Hmm, it’s a bit embarrassing, so I shall keep that a secret. *

speaker: Argo
text: Tch.

speaker: Celio
text: However, it makes me happy that you aren’t afraid to ask such questions.

speaker: Argo
text: Oh? Then let’s talk about your first love… *sigh*

speaker: Celio
text: Hey! Don’t get carried away!

speaker: Argo
text: S-Sorry.
